free_text: .Ti-T target contains a small accumulation of D
-In foils were wrapped in Al foil during irradiation
In foils were sandwiched between 2 Fe foils as flux
In foils were sandwiched between 65 or 78
milli-g/cm*cm Mo thick absorber foils (B counting)
for determination of isomeric cross section
to reduce statistical errors on results
Error values were copied from Subent 001 (free text)
distances of source position from Ge-detector(COINC.),
(N-N) cross sections were reduced by 2.5+-1.5 percent
All these results are given for En=14.3 MeV
These results are given for En=14.67 MeV
This result is given FOR En=16.63 MeV
This result is given FOR En=18.12 MeV
